zh.Montcada i Reixac, Barcelona, Cataluña,: 西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿蒙卡達 I 萊薩
zh.lifeSummary: Guillem Ramón I Senescal de Barcelona於1065年出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿蒙卡達 I 萊薩。他至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1120年在他的家鄉享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Guillem
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Ramón
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Guillem Ramón I Senescal de Barcelona was born in 1065, in Montcada i Reixac, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1120, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

ko.Montcada i Reixac, Barcelona, Cataluña,: 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 몽카다 이 레이스악
ko.lifeSummary: Guillem Ramón I Senescal de Barcelona(은)는 1065년 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 몽카다 이 레이스악에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1120년 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Guillem Ramón I Senescal de Barcelona родился в 1065 г. в местности монткада и риксак, барселона, каталуня, Испания. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1120 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.
